_comment: Fleet pubkeys (hex) permitted to write to the Nave relay. The write-policy plugin accepts: events from these authors; allowKinds from anyone (NIP-46 transport 24133 — encrypted); recipientKinds (NIP-59 gift wraps, 1059) when ADDRESSED to a fleet key via a p tag — wraps have ephemeral authors by design, so the grant plane needs recipient-based admission (nave.pub#37). Add the operator + sovereign keys once minted; keep partners (e.g. warm.contact) OFF this list — they use public relays.
